title: Bura
description: Bura is an alpha Fabric performance mod that reduces lag spikes and improves FPS stability by optimizing chunk compilation, upload scheduling, and visibility culling in singleplayer.
body:
# Bura
Version: Alpha 0.2.0  
Minecraft: 1.21.11  
Loader: Fabric

Bura is an experimental performance mod focused on improving FPS consistency and reducing rendering-related CPU spikes. It currently targets chunk scheduling, upload pacing, and visibility work, with a strong focus on lower-end and CPU-limited systems.

## Performance Snapshot
Tested on `Intel Core i3-10100F @ 3.60GHz` against Vanilla Fabric under the same settings and world conditions.

![Buraafterandbefore2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/524570e2c7a9abe4378a7b2f3a65973c121a1807_0.webp)

| Metric | Vanilla Fabric | Bura Alpha 0.2.0 | Change |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Peak FPS | 140 | 297 | +112% |
| Average Frame Time | 7 ms | 4 ms | -42% |
| CPU Usage (Process) | 51.6% | 25.4% | -50% |
| 95th Percentile MSPT | 2.96 ms | 2.28 ms | -23% |

## What Bura Optimizes
### Chunk compilation scheduling
Bura reduces frame spikes caused by chunk rebuild bursts by spreading expensive work more intelligently.

### Chunk upload pacing
GPU upload work is distributed across frames to avoid sudden stutter from large render updates.

### Visibility culling
Bura reduces unnecessary rendering work by avoiding repeated processing for geometry that is not visible.

## Compatibility
Bura is designed to work alongside other optimization mods and focuses primarily on frame pacing and workload scheduling.

Tested combinations:
- Sodium
- Iris
- ImmediatelyFast
- Entity Culling
- Lithium
- FerriteCore

## Known Limitations
- Aggressive culling may still cause occasional chunk flicker or ghosting.
- Alpha build: behavior may change between versions.
- Some particle or rendering mods may require compatibility fixes.

## Roadmap
- Reduce memory usage and heap allocation rate to lower gc stutter
- Improve chunk loading behavior at high movement speeds
- Reduce flicker from aggressive visibility culling
- Expand compatibility with more rendering mods
